message:
test(demo): add Performance HUD E2E test suite (bd-3k3x.7)

Comprehensive E2E tests for the Performance HUD overlay:
- Toggle behavior: on/off with Ctrl+P, idempotent double-toggle
- Content verification: metrics display (FPS, Tick rate, percentiles)
- Graceful degradation: tiny (40x10) and wide (200x50) terminals
- Determinism: hash-based render consistency checks
- Ring buffer: 150 tick stress test for capacity limit

10 tests total with JSONL verbose logging for CI traceability.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
